name: tax_lookup
description: Look up tax refunds for a customer by their name. Returns a JSON array of matching refund records with name, refund_type (PROPERTY_TAX, STALE_WARRANT, or PAYROLL), amount, claim_deadline, address, and claim_url. Returns a no-match message string if no refunds are found.

customer_name.description: The customer's full name to search for refunds

name: send_sms
description: Send an SMS text message to a US phone number. Use this to send refund claim links to voice callers who cannot click links. Only send when the caller confirms they want to receive a text.

phone_number.description: US phone number in E.164 format (e.g. +12125551234)

message.description: The SMS message body to send (max 160 characters)
